name: Alcremie

forms.name: Ruby-Cream
forms.pokedexDescription: The moment it evolved, it took on a sweet and tart flavor. This is because of the way its cells spontaneously shifted during evolution.

forms.name: Matcha-Cream
forms.pokedexDescription: The cells that compose its cream fluctuated suddenly during evolution, giving the cream an aromatic flavor.

forms.name: Mint-Cream
forms.pokedexDescription: The moment it evolved, it took on a refreshing flavor. This is because of the way its cells spontaneously shifted during evolution.

forms.name: Lemon-Cream
forms.pokedexDescription: The moment it evolved, it took on a sour flavor. This is because of the way its cells spontaneously shifted during evolution.

forms.name: Salted-Cream
forms.pokedexDescription: The moment it evolved, it took on a salty flavor. This is because of the way its cells spontaneously shifted during evolution.

forms.name: Ruby-Swirl
forms.pokedexDescription: The moment it evolved, it took on a mixed flavor. This is because of the way its cells spontaneously shifted during evolution.

forms.name: Caramel-Swirl
forms.pokedexDescription: The moment it evolved, it took on a bitter flavor. This is because of the way its cells spontaneously shifted during evolution.

forms.name: Rainbow-Swirl
forms.pokedexDescription: The cells that compose its cream fluctuated suddenly during evolution, giving the cream a complex flavor.

forms.name: Gmax
forms.pokedexDescription: Cream pours endlessly from this Pokémon’s body. The cream stiffens when compressed by an impact. A harder impact results in harder cream.

pokedexDescription: When it trusts a Trainer, it will treat them to berries it's decorated with cream.
